chunks.en: The first thing I do is check my phone.
chunks.ja: 朝、私が最初にすることはスマホを確認することです。

chunks.en: In the morning, I read the news and messages.
chunks.ja: 朝は、ニュースとメッセージを読みます。

chunks.en: The app I open the most is a chat app.
chunks.ja: 私がいちばんよく開くアプリはチャットアプリです。

chunks.en: I also use maps when I go to work.
chunks.ja: 仕事に行くときは地図アプリも使います。

chunks.en: I use my phone on the train every day.
chunks.ja: 私は毎日、電車の中でスマホを使います。

chunks.en: At home, I watch short videos before bed.
chunks.ja: 家では、寝る前に短い動画を見ます。

chunks.en: One thing I want to change is my screen time.
chunks.ja: 変えたいことのひとつは、画面を見る時間です。

chunks.en: So I want to use my phone less at night.
chunks.ja: だから、夜はスマホをもっと使わないようにしたいです。

outline: Opening: my phone is part of my day
Point 1: morning routine and top apps
Point 2: when and where I use it
Wrap-up: I want to cut my screen time

modelTalk.text: I'll tell you about my phone. Every morning, I wake up and grab my phone. First, I turn off the alarm. Then I check the time and the weather. I open my chat app the most. I talk with my friends and family there. I also watch short videos a lot. I use my phone on the train and at home. Sometimes I use it while I eat lunch. That's not a good habit, I think. I want to change one thing. I want to look at my phone less at night. It's hard, but I'll try. My eyes need some rest. That's my plan.

chunks.en: Today I want to talk about my phone.
chunks.ja: 今日は自分のスマホについて話したいです。

chunks.en: The first thing I do is check the time.
chunks.ja: まず最初にするのは時間を確認することです。

chunks.en: The app I open the most is my email.
chunks.ja: いちばんよく開くアプリはメールです。

chunks.en: I use my phone on the train to work.
chunks.ja: 通勤の電車の中でスマホを使います。

chunks.en: I also use it a lot at home at night.
chunks.ja: 夜、家でもよくスマホを使います。

chunks.en: One thing I want to change is my screen time.
chunks.ja: 変えたいことの一つはスクリーンタイムです。

chunks.en: So I want to use my phone a little less.
chunks.ja: だから、スマホを使う時間を少し減らしたいです。

outline: Point 1: morning use and top apps
Point 2: when and where I use it
Wrap-up: one thing I want to change

modelTalk.text: I'll tell you about my phone. Every morning, I wake up and grab my phone. First, I turn off the alarm. Then I check the time and the weather. I open my messages too. I look at my chat app the most. I use it to talk with my friends. I also open a video app a lot. I watch short clips when I'm bored. I use my phone at home and on the train. Sometimes I use it in bed at night. That's the thing I want to change. I don't want to look at it so late. So I'll try to sleep earlier.
